name: Melting Moments with Orange Buttercream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3/4 cup of the butter, granulated sugar, egg, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in a large mixing bowl. Beat at high speed until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt together; add to the butter mixture and mix well with flaked coconut.
3. Shape into balls using round teaspoons of dough for each. Place on greased cookie sheets and flatten with a floured fork or use cookie stamps.
4. Bake in a preheated oven until golden, 12 to 15 minutes. Remove from the cookie sheet and cool on a wire rack.
5. Melt dipping chocolate over hot water in the top of a double boiler. Use 4 ounces of semisweet chocolate and 1 tablespoon vegetable shortening. Stir occasionally until the chocolate melts. Remove from heat.
6. Dip half of each cookie in melted chocolate, then place on aluminum foil and let stand until the chocolate sets.
7. Prepare Orange Buttercream by placing ingredients into a small mixing bowl; stir until smooth. A teaspoonful of grated orange rind may be added to the cookie dough if desired. Makes about 2 dozen cookies.
